Title: Archive or delete accounts
Status: Code Present

Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Accounts parity port from ops-dashboard

As a account operator
I want archive and destructive delete paths for accounts
So that the portfolio can be cleaned up without losing intent

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Accounts can be archived and restored from the workspace.
- [ ] A confirmed delete path removes the account and related data.

Notes: Both paths are implemented; destructive behavior was not executed in this review.
